title: Dubbele kloof zorgt voor extra druk op logistiek vastgoed
summary: De invoering van de zero-emissie zones zal de druk op logistiek Nederland alleen maar doen toenemen. Dit vraagt om meer samenwerking om goederenstromen naar de stad te bundelen.

title: The Feminist City
summary: In onze serie 'Feminist City' belichtten we verschillende perspectieven van vrouwen in steden en hoe stedelijke planning, stedelijk bestuur en kantoorinrichting vrouwen beter kunnen ondersteunen in hun dagelijks leven.

title: Overzicht Value of a City Insights
summary: In de serie 'Value of a City' geven wij maandelijks onze visie op een onderwerp dat te maken heeft met de waarde van de stad. Deze visie komt tot stand vanuit intern onderzoek en dialoog met interne en externe stakeholders, in nauwe samenwerking met consultants en analisten uit ons Real Estate Strategy & Innovation team.

title: Waypoint - Global Industrial Logistics
summary: Waypoint 2026 provides in-depth analysis of logistics and industrial real estate markets across France and EMEA, covering rental trends, supply chain resilience, operational costs, energy transition and future market dynamics.

title: 2026 Data Center Market Study: EMEA and France Driving Digital Infrastructure Growth
summary: Comprehensive analysis of the global data center market in 2026 with a focus on the EMEA region and France. The study highlights sustained digital infrastructure growth, the impact of AI, energy and regulatory challenges, and the evolution of major European hubs including Paris, Frankfurt, London, Dublin, and Milan.

title: Transparency Education Sector
summary: Education has found its place in the real estate market. Discover why the education sector has become one of the most relevant occupiers in Spain’s office market — and what this means for investors and property owners.

title: From Algorithm to Infrastructure - The Reinvention of Data Centers in the AI Era
summary: Generative AI is radically transforming the French data center landscape. Once focused primarily on data storage, facilities are now evolving into high-density computing infrastructures designed for AI workloads. This shift requires massive increases in power capacity, advanced liquid cooling systems, and entirely new architectural standards. Supported by a highly decarbonized energy mix and a €109 billion national AI strategy, France — led by Paris — is emerging as a strategic European hub for sovereign and sustainable AI infrastructure investment.

title: Residential Development in Lisbon and Porto – The Supply Challenge
summary: Cushman & Wakefield Portugal is proud to present its first report entirely dedicated to the residential development market in Greater Lisbon and Greater Porto, an in-depth analysis at a particularly challenging moment for the housing sector in Portugal.

title: Are gas heating systems acceptable again?
summary: On Tuesday, 24 February 2026, the governing parties published a key policy paper on the amendment of the Building Energy Act (GEG). The law will be renamed the “Building Modernization Act” (GMG). What changes will this bring for investors and tenants, and what price changes can be expected?
